ksa_text: Knowledge of talent management practices for data and AI organizations, including workforce planning methodologies, skills gap analysis, hiring strategy, retention approaches, career path development, and succession planning.

dcwf.top_element_label: Identify and address AI workforce planning and management issues (e.g., recruitment, retention, and training).

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Identify and address AI workforce planning and management issues (e.g., recruitment, retention, and training).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Leadership & Strategy is an edge domain for the VP Data Platform, this knowledge KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.474) and conceptual alignment to include at the vp level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.474). External reviewers may question whether this specific knowledge KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Data Platform versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for VP Data Platform.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy knowledge KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.474. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the VP Data Platform.
